subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! For some time past Jináb-i-Áqá Suhráb hath been engaged in service at the Sacred Threshold of the Divine, and from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله جناب آقا سهراب مدتی بود که در درگاه احدیت بخدمت مشغول بود و از
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
